mandatoryChecks: Actual current app implements the approved universal Login / Sign Up screen.
Only product icon, name, tagline and accent colour change.
No version/build/channel/hash appears on Login, Sign Up, OTP, recovery, onboarding or splash.
Powered by Kuklabs is the final auth-screen element.
Version x.y.z (Build n) appears only as the bottom-most muted footer in Profile > About this app.
Screen connects to shared Kuklabs AuthKit.
Official Google multicolour G is used.
No raw JSON or framework error is displayed.
